flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia College Chicago rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.8k → $34.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia College Chicago rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.8k → $34.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Columbia College Chicago fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5k → 5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia College Chicago fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
